findings.title: Audit started against https://example.com
WHOIS data collected for example.com
Subdomain enumeration: 37616 hosts discovered
WAF detected: Cloudflare (Cloudflare Inc.) WAF.
findings.description: The target appears to be protected by a Web Application Firewall.

findings.title: Version disclosure via 'Server' header
findings.description: The server reveals technology/version info in response headers.
findings.recommendation: Remove or neutralise the 'Server' header in your web server configuration.

findings.title: Certificate expires in 52 days
findings.recommendation: Plan certificate renewal.

findings.title: HSTS header not configured
findings.description: Strict-Transport-Security is absent — browsers may access the site over HTTP.
findings.recommendation: Add: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload

findings.title: Permissions-Policy missing
findings.description: The response is missing the 'permissions-policy' security header.
findings.recommendation: Add: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()

findings.title: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy (CORP) missing
findings.description: The response is missing the 'cross-origin-resource-policy' security header.
findings.recommendation: Add: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin

findings.title: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy (COOP) missing
findings.description: The response is missing the 'cross-origin-opener-policy' security header.
findings.recommendation: Add: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin

findings.title: X-Content-Type-Options missing — MIME sniffing risk
findings.description: The response is missing the 'x-content-type-options' security header.
findings.recommendation: Add: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

findings.title: X-Frame-Options missing — clickjacking risk
findings.description: The response is missing the 'x-frame-options' security header.
findings.recommendation: Add: X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN

findings.title: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) missing
findings.description: The response is missing the 'content-security-policy' security header.
findings.recommendation: Implement a strict CSP to mitigate XSS and data injection attacks.

findings.title: Referrer-Policy missing
findings.description: The response is missing the 'referrer-policy' security header.
findings.recommendation: Add: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

findings.title: Informative header exposed: Server
findings.description: Server reveals technology details via 'Server' header.
findings.recommendation: Remove or anonymise the 'Server' header in your server configuration.

findings.title: HTTP does not redirect to HTTPS (HTTP 200)
findings.description: Requests over HTTP are not automatically upgraded to HTTPS.
findings.recommendation: Configure a permanent 301 redirect from HTTP to HTTPS.

findings.title: Cache-Control header missing
findings.description: Without Cache-Control, sensitive pages may be cached by intermediaries.
findings.recommendation: Add: Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache on authenticated/sensitive pages.

findings.title: No obvious SQLi on primary URL
findings.description: Manual testing with specific parameters recommended.

findings.title: CMS detected: unknown
No in-band SSRF detected on common parameters
findings.description: Out-of-band (OOB) SSRF may still exist. Use Burp Collaborator or Interactsh for blind testing.
